Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0] if isinstance\(data,list\) else data, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(len\(d\),'stocks'\); [print\(x['medicine']['name'], x['quantity']\) for x in d[:4]]")
